testcase.name: test.api1_test
testcase.error: ImportError while importing test module '/Users/rweigel/git/hxform/test/api1_test.py'. Hint: make sure your test modules/packages have valid Python names. Traceback: ../../.local/share/nox/pythons/cpython@3.11.15/lib/python3.11/importlib/__init__.py:126: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ test/api1_test.py:110: in <module> vt = trans(v, t, lib) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ test/api1_test.py:16: in trans return hxform.transform(v, t, 'GEO', 'GSE', lib=lib) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ hxform/transform.py:134: in transform vt, execution_time = _geopack_08_dp(v, t, frame_in, frame_out) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ hxform/transform.py:338: in _geopack_08_dp raise ImportError( E ImportError: gfortran is not installed. To use geopack_08_dp, execute E conda install -c conda-forge gfortran meson ninja -y E and reinstall hxform (using --force-reinstall) or reinstall the packagethat depends on hxform (using --force-reinstall).
